role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic markers (no signs) and stayed silent in Phase 2.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (Acacia/Vachellia) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (utility poles, road surfaces).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used cross-domain knowledge (camera generation, vehicle hood color) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Botswana) by leveraging the 'meta' agent's specific knowledge of Google Street View coverage artifacts (the 'brown car' hood), which served as the decisive tie-breaker against the visually similar Namibia.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of red soil and scrubland match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of xeric shrubland match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of wooden poles and dirt roads match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: The 'brown car' hood is clearly visible at the bottom of the frame.
